description: Add E2E tests for plugin group transitions in the side panel: plugins moving between ready and not-ready groups when tabs open/close, the 'NOT CONNECTED' label visibility, and accordion auto-collapse during group transitions.

userStories.title: E2E test: plugin moves from NOT CONNECTED to ready group when matching tab opens
userStories.description: Test that when a tab matching a plugin's URL pattern opens and the adapter becomes ready, the plugin card moves from the not-connected section to the ready section at the top of the list.
acceptanceCriteria: With no matching tab, the plugin card appears in the not-connected section
The 'NOT CONNECTED' label is visible above the not-connected section
Opening a matching tab and waiting for ready state moves the card to the top section
The card in the ready section has full opacity (not dimmed)
The card in the not-connected section had reduced opacity
userStories.notes:
Files: - e2e/side-panel-group-transitions.e2e.ts (new file) Context: PluginList.tsx renders two separate Accordion components: - Line 198: Ready plugins accordion (full opacity) - Line 209: Not-ready plugins accordion (with 'NOT CONNECTED' label) The 'NOT CONNECTED' label at line 203: ```tsx {notReadyPlugins.length > 0 && (
NOT CONNECTED
)} ``` PluginCard.tsx line 168-176 applies `opacity-70` for inactive (not-ready) plugins. The `useGroupTransitions` hook (line 23) detects plugins moving between groups and applies animation classes. Test approach: 1. Start with the e2e-test plugin but NO matching tab open → plugin in not-connected section 2. Open a tab navigating to the test server URL → adapter injects → plugin becomes ready 3. Verify the plugin card moved to the ready section (above 'NOT CONNECTED' label) For step 1, verify: ```typescript // NOT CONNECTED label visible await expect(sidePanel.getByText('NOT CONNECTED')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15_000 }); // Plugin card has reduced opacity const pluginCard = sidePanel.locator('[data-radix-accordion-item]').filter({ hasText: 'E2E Test' }); await expect(pluginCard).toHaveClass(/opacity-70/); ``` For step 3, after opening the tab: ```typescript // Wait for plugin to become ready await waitForLog(server, 'tab.stateChanged: e2e-test → ready', 15_000); // Plugin card should no longer have reduced opacity await expect(pluginCard).not.toHaveClass(/opacity-70/, { timeout: 10_000 }); ``` Use the standard test server fixture + e2e-test plugin. Constraints: - The group transition animation (200ms) is too fast to reliably catch in E2E — test the end state, not the animation itself. - Use `waitForLog` for tab state changes to avoid race conditions.

userStories.title: E2E test: plugin moves from ready to NOT CONNECTED group when tab closes
userStories.description: Test that when the last matching tab for a ready plugin is closed, the plugin card moves from the ready section to the not-connected section.
acceptanceCriteria: Plugin is initially ready (matching tab open)
Closing the matching tab triggers the plugin to move to not-connected section
The plugin card gets reduced opacity in the not-connected section

userStories.title: E2E test: accordion auto-collapses during group transition
userStories.description: Test that when a plugin moves between ready and not-ready groups, its accordion card is automatically collapsed in the new group (collapseTransitioningItems behavior).
acceptanceCriteria: Expand a plugin card in the ready section
Close the matching tab so the plugin transitions to not-connected
After transition, the plugin card is collapsed in the not-connected section
The collapse happens automatically (user did not click the card)
